{{Quote|Here we are. Just where we usually show up—between Rybet and Saadul. And my clan-mates are here!|The Ryn [[Droma]] searches for his family on the Ruan database|<ref name="AoC" />}}
The '''Saadul''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="AoC" /> In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' to [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].</ref> a number of Saadul were displaced by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and ended up with numerous other refugees on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruan]]. The Ruan authorities created a central database keeping track of all refugees. While the list was sorted by species, the Saadul did not receive an entry in the main listing; instead, along with the [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]] and [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] species, they were placed in the "other" category. This was a common occurrence for the species.<ref name="AoC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Saadul were created by [[James Luceno]] for his novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'', published by [[Del Rey]] in [[2000]] as book five of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="AoC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1stm}}
